name: My Life Turned Around: Contract Marriage to Become the President’s Wife
original_name: 私の逆転人生 〜契約結婚で社長夫人〜
overview: Chased by thugs and drugged against her will, Saki Yume flees into the night and accidentally collides with Kuroba Takuya, mistaking him for a host. They spend a single night together—but when their photo is leaked to the press, Kuroba Takuya proposes a contract marriage to protect his reputation.

trailers.title: 【ハイライト】「冷奈の嫉妬を超えて、拓真の守護が始まる！」🔥 | DramaBox
